default_generator.description: Which model builds new courses by default. 'local' uses your Ollama/qwen model (free, slower); 'codex' uses gurney-codex if it's enabled and authed (faster, spends your daily Codex budget); 'cloud' uses an OpenAI-compatible endpoint configured in gurney-openai-compatible. Codex/cloud fall back to local automatically if unavailable.

default_depth.description: How many modules and lessons a new course aims for. 'quick' is fastest to generate; 'deep' is the most thorough but takes the longest on local models.

use_websearch.description: Research the topic on the web before building a course, for fresher and more accurate material. Requires the gurney-websearch extension to be installed and enabled; ignored otherwise.
